suspensions.reason: You have been involved in too many on track incidents and contacts over the last 10 races, you have been automatically suspended for 1 day, due to high SR Incident Ratio 1st Offense. If your on track behaviour does not improve after the suspension the next ban will be longer, you will have 5 races to try and improve your SR Ratio and try to gain a clean or trusted racer badge.
